_comment: Manual overrides for metrics not available in SEC structured data. Governance scores (0-100, higher = riskier) and analyst commentary go here. Add entries as ticker: {fields}.
_governance_guide: 0-25: Top-tier sponsor with active support. 25-50: Strong sponsor, explicit commitment. 50-75: Mid-tier or limited support. 75-100: Small sponsor, fee-priority, conflicted governance.
